metadata.description: Lightweight environmental constraint index for site selection. Protected-area points are included if fetch_osm_protected_areas.py has been run. Flood, seismic, and wildfire categories are empty pending source data acquisition.

source_notes.protected_area_points: 1082 protected area centroid points from OSM boundary=protected_area / leisure=nature_reserve via Geofabrik extracts. Source quality: observed. Coverage: regions processed by fetch_osm_protected_areas.py.
source_notes.flood_risk_zones: EMPTY — no flood risk dataset available. Recommended source: JRC Global Flood Hazard Map or Fathom.
source_notes.seismic_hazard_zones: EMPTY — no seismic hazard dataset available. Recommended source: GSHAP global hazard map.
source_notes.wildfire_risk_zones: EMPTY — no wildfire risk dataset available. Recommended source: Global Fire Emissions Database or GFW.

metadata.empty_categories_warning: Flood, seismic, and wildfire categories are empty. These exclusion thresholds are currently untriggered. Environmental due diligence is required for every candidate.
